name: Breakfast Sheshuka
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil (preferably safflower or sunflower) in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and minced garlic to the pan. Cook until the onions become translucent and tender.
3. Add the chopped tomatoes to the pan. Reduce the heat to low and cover the pan. Cook until the tomatoes reach your desired texture, taking care not to overcook them.
4. Gently add the beaten eggs to the pan. Turn the heat back up slightly and cook until the eggs are just set, with some parts still moist if preferred.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot.
